title: doria nivea
intro: Doria nivea, also known as white doria or white sandalwood, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to Australia. The plant is valued for its essential oils, which possess medicinal properties such as antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Doria nivea include its ability to alleviate skin conditions, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Doria nivea is often prepared as an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, or as a herbal tea, and can also be applied topically to the skin after proper dilution with a carrier oil.
